name: Office Manager
author: Poki
description: Dasi Office Manager is a management game where your goal is to build and run the best office around! Start small, welcoming all kinds of people to work in your space, cleaning up after them, and expanding as you go. Hire helpful staff to keep things running smoothly and earn Stars for doing an awesome job. With every upgrade, make your office even more amazing. Think you have what it takes to be the best Office Manager? How to play Dasi Office Manager? Move with WASD or arrow keys or the joystick. Who created Dasi Office Manager? Dasi Office Manager is created by Dasi Game. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Dasi Office Manager for free? You can play Dasi Office Manager for free on Poki. Can I play Dasi Office Manager on mobile devices and desktop? Dasi Office Manager can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
